occupation: General Manager - Future Media and Sustainability at Provantage
headline: GM Future Media & Sustainability | Programmatic, Digital Transformation & ESG Strategy | Doctoral Candidate (GIBS)
summary:
Jorja Wilkins works at the intersection of corporate strategy, decision making and organisational responsibility. Her focus is how organisations translate information into accountable action commercially, operationally and over the long term in increasingly data enabled environments.

She leads strategic transformation initiatives across media, digital transformation and ESG integration, designing governance frameworks, measurement systems and operating models that help organisations make consistent and defensible decisions at scale. Her experience spans complex multi stakeholder environments and behaviour influencing programmes where commercial performance must align with organisational commitments.

Jorja is completing a PhD at GIBS Business School grounded in Upper Echelons Theory, exploring how CEOs shape sustainability orientation and strategic choices within media organisations.

She speaks and writes on responsible growth, measurement accountability and the evolving role of insight in executive decision making.
location_str: City of Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa

experiences.title: General Manager - Future Media and Sustainability
Founder and CEO
experiences.description: As the Founder and CEO of Garland Media, Jorja Wilkins leads a dynamic company dedicated to excellence in project management and industry initiatives within the African media landscape. With over 15 years of experience, Jorja drives Garland Media in providing strategic guidance, innovative solutions, and unparalleled project management services. Her vision encompasses a strong commitment to sustainable practices, ensuring that all projects align with principles of sustainability and purpose. Under her leadership, Garland Media empowers media organisations by setting new benchmarks for efficiency, innovation, and excellence, while actively shaping a sustainable future for media in Africa through thought leadership and collaborative efforts.

experiences.title: Marketing Services Strategist
experiences.description:
In-depth strategic analytical evaluation of all markets across South Africa. Evaluating the demographics; psychographics; media intake and complete analysis of areas to ensure the client is reaching the intended market with the correct use of media. Understanding media gaps of: print; radio and television in the market, and how to up weight the media intake of the intended market with the use of analytical tools and strategies. 

Understanding the environment and the primary business drivers of key clients with the objective of providing strategically relevant sales solutions assisting clients with their strategy; planning and implementation of their OOH ideals - to ensure correct positioning/targeting in the ever changing South African market. 

Building cross-product expertise and serve as strategic thought partner both within sales and marketing. Framing and conducting analysis to translate growth ideas into tangible growth opportunities and strategies (size, value proposition, customer needs, segments, required go-to-market changes, etc.
